name: useSet
description: Hook that manages a set structure
examples: const { value, add, remove, clear, reset, toggle, union, intersection, difference, symmetricDifference, size, has } = useSet([1, 2, 3]);

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The initial array of the set

source.source: * @param {Value[]} [values] The initial array of the set

tokens.name: [values]
tokens.description: The initial array of the set

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current set and functions to interact with the set
